name: adev-writing-guide
tagline: Style and formatting guide for authoring Angular (adev) documentation: Google writing standards plus Angular-specific markdown/components.
verdict: Clean, self-contained content guide with a numbered precedence order for style conflicts, concrete formatting examples throughout, and a tightly directory-scoped trigger. No security concerns. Missing negative triggers and any versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog heading, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
